name: csd-sdk
description: Compute Substrate (CSD) SDK + light client — L0 of the no-fork ecosystem roadmap. One canonical, golden-vector-tested toolkit for building on CSD.

scripts.test:e2e: tsx test/oracle.test.ts && tsx test/edge.test.ts && tsx test/security.test.ts
scripts.test:crosslang: node conformance/crosscheck.mjs && node conformance/crosscheck-regex.mjs && node conformance/crosscheck-resolve.mjs && node conformance/crosscheck-siwc.mjs && node conformance/nprofile-crosslang.mjs && node conformance/fuzz-resolve.mjs 1500 && node conformance/v20-latefill-crosslang.mjs && node conformance/v20-incident-69csd.mjs && node conformance/v21-offer-cap-crosslang.mjs && node conformance/v22-uncap-crosslang.mjs && node conformance/v23-nset-clear-crosslang.mjs && node conformance/v24-fee-crosslang.mjs && node conformance/v25-register-crosslang.mjs && node conformance/v26-recapture-crosslang.mjs
scripts.audit:all: node conformance/audit-selftest.mjs && node conformance/invariants.mjs --selftest && node conformance/money-safety.mjs --selftest && node conformance/invariants.mjs && node conformance/race-harness.mjs
